mapper.sql: sys_message.messageId, sys_message.deviceId, sys_message.sessionId, sys_message.message, sys_message.sender, sys_message.roleId, sys_message.state, sys_message.createTime, sys_message.messageType, sys_message.audioPath, sys_message.toolCalls, sys_message.audio_group
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message ( deviceId, sessionId, sender, roleId, message, messageType, createTime) SELECT #{deviceId}, #{sessionId}, #{sender}, #{roleId}, #{message}, #{messageType}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

INSERT INTO sys_message ( deviceId, sessionId, sender, roleId, message, messageType, audioPath, createTime, toolCalls, audio_group) VALUES
(#{message.deviceId}, #{message.sessionId}, #{message.sender}, #{message.roleId}, #{message.message}, #{message.messageType}, #{message.audioPath}, #{message.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{message.toolCalls}, #{message.audioGroup})

INSERT INTO sys_summary ( deviceId, roleId, lastMessageTimestamp, summary, promptTokens, completionTokens, createTime) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{roleId}, #{lastMessageTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{summary}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT deviceId, roleId, lastMessageTimestamp, summary, createTime FROM sys_summary WHERE sys_summary.deviceId = #{deviceId} AND sys_summary.roleId = #{roleId} ORDER BY sys_summary.createTime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM sys_message WHERE sys_message.messageId = #{messageId} AND sys_message.state = 1

SELECT IFNULL(m.sessionId, CONCAT('legacy_', m.messageId)) AS sessionId, COALESCE( MAX(m.session_title), SUBSTRING(MIN(CASE WHEN m.sender = 'user' THEN CONCAT(LPAD(m.messageId, 10, '0'), m.message) END), 11, 30) ) AS title, COUNT(*) AS messageCount, MIN(m.createTime) AS firstMessageTime, MAX(m.createTime) AS lastMessageTime, m.deviceId AS deviceId, d.deviceName AS deviceName, r.roleName AS roleName FROM sys_message m LEFT JOIN sys_device d ON m.deviceId = d.deviceId LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON m.roleId = r.roleId WHERE m.state = 1 AND d.userId = #{userId} AND m.deviceId = #{deviceId} AND m.createTime >= #{startTime} AND m.createTime <= #{endTime} GROUP BY IFNULL(m.sessionId, CONCAT('legacy_', m.messageId)), m.deviceId, d.deviceName, r.roleName ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC

SELECT m.sessionId FROM sys_message m LEFT JOIN sys_device d ON m.deviceId = d.deviceId WHERE m.state = 1 AND m.sessionId IS NOT NULL AND m.sessionId != '' AND d.userId = #{userId} GROUP BY m.sessionId HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND MAX(m.session_title) IS NULL ORDER BY MAX(m.createTime) DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_message WHERE sessionId = #{sessionId} AND state = 1 AND messageType = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY createTime ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM sys_message WHERE sys_message.deviceId = #{deviceId} AND sys_message.sessionId = #{sessionId} AND sys_message.sender = 'user' AND sys_message.state = 1 ORDER BY sys_message.createTime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM sys_message WHERE sys_message.sender = 'user' AND sys_message.audioPath IS NOT NULL AND sys_message.audioPath != '' AND sys_message.state = 1 AND sys_message.createTime < #{expireTime}

SELECT
FROM sys_message WHERE sys_message.state = 1 AND sys_message.messageId IN
#{id}
ORDER BY sys_message.createTime ASC
